(Translated by Google)
Hidden within the town are the best public restrooms in Argentina...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtck56MG1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Right place at the right time.

Fernando helped me when I arrived by bicycle, tired from a day of cycling.

He showed me a place to sleep and helped me with information about the city and Route 40!

There's no food for sale, but there's a refrigerator with cold sodas and water!

(Original)
No lugar certo e na hora certa.
Fernando me ajudou quando cheguei de bicicleta cansado de um dia pedalando.

Me indicou lugar pra dormir e me ajudou com informações sobre a cidade e sobre a rota 40!

Não há comidas para vender mas tem uma geladeira com refrigerantes e água gelados!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtaElhZ29nRRAB

reviews.comment:

Amazing place. Super clean, peaceful, quiet, and the people are very friendly. 👐

reviews.comment:
Impecable la estación de servicio , los baños excelentes ,lejos los mejores !! Samuel muy amable en su atención . Hualfin siempre queremos regresar!!

(Translated by Google)
The gas station was spotless, the restrooms were excellent, by far the best!! Samuel was very friendly and helpful. We always want to come back to Hualfin!!

reviews.comment:
Lugar muy limpio, baños impecables. La atención excelente. Lo único que les falta es un termo para agua caliente.

(Translated by Google)
Very clean place, impeccable bathrooms. Excellent service. The only thing missing is a hot water thermos.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención por parte del playero, los baños limpios y me asesoró en todos los detalles por información turística. Muy cordiales. Muchas Gracias

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendant, clean restrooms, and he provided me with all the tourist information I needed. Very friendly. Thank you very much.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlcWFESTVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fuimos varias veces y también  amigos viajeros pararon a dormir en este lugar, Excelente atencion de el playero FERNANDO, muy buena predisposición cordial y amable...el mantiene el lugar👍 muy limpio, ayudemos a mantenerlo asi ...hermoso entorno !! Volveremos ...gracias gran abrazo de #latapita_melincue

(Translated by Google)
We've been several times, and fellow travelers have also stopped to sleep here. Excellent service from the attendant, Fernando, who was very helpful, friendly, and accommodating. He keeps the place spotless, so let's help him keep it that way. Beautiful surroundings! We'll be back. Thanks, and a big hug from #latapita_melincue
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1eG9tWU5nEAE
